title: Visual Enchantment Books
description: A resource pack adding better textures to enchantment books. This pack works with Optifine, CIT Resewn, and Chime.
body:
# Important
[Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) must be installed to use this pack.
# About
A resource pack adding custom better textures to enchantment books. 

![Image of all the enchantment books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PVNHbJV3/images/5dee5193047f3572405402ccb2b8ca7c15560658.png)
